display.purpose: Hub heroes and space titles; often uppercase italic.

body.purpose: Control and content text at 15px, weight 500.

kicker.purpose: Micro-labels inside chrome pills: black weight, uppercase, 0.2em tracking.

shadows.name: shadow-soft
shadows.purpose: Default lift for cards and chrome at rest.

shadows.name: shadow-soft-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover lift, usually paired with the hover glow.

shadows.name: shadow-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Diffuse primary halo on interactive hover — never a hard ring.

motion.name: pillOpen
motion.purpose: Footprint expand, modal open — stiffer and livelier.

motion.name: pillClose
motion.purpose: Collapse, modal close, floor shadow — heavier settle.

motion.name: press
motion.value: spring via createWeeTransition('press'); scale 0.93 press / 1.03 hover, y -1.5

motion.name: space-shell
motion.purpose: Space slide + wallpaper crossfade + dock choreography.

motion.name: nav-standard
motion.purpose: Small state transitions in navigation chrome.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid Console Cyan action button — uppercase italic playful voice, thick border, elevated shadow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: hsl(195 75% 60%); color: #fff; border: 3px solid hsl(195 75% 60%); border-radius: 1.65rem; padding: 0.52rem 1.18rem; font-family: 'Nunito', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; font-style: italic; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.18); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgb(15 36 61 / 0.2); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: hsl(195 75% 55%); transform: translateY(-1.5px) scale(1.03); box-shadow: 0 12px 28px -10px rgb(15 36 61 / 0.22), 0 0 18px hsl(195 75% 60% / 0.28); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 4px hsl(195 75% 60%); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.93); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outlined neutral action; border shifts to Console Cyan on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: hsl(220 20% 95%); color: hsl(220 10% 20%); border: 2px solid hsl(220 10% 70%); border-radius: 1.65rem; padding: 0.52rem 1.18rem; font-family: 'Nunito', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; font-style: italic; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.22s, border-color 0.22s, box-shadow 0.22s, transform 0.22s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: hsl(220 10% 95%); border-color: hsl(195 75% 60%); transform: translateY(-1.5px) scale(1.03); box-shadow: 0 12px 28px -10px rgb(15 36 61 / 0.22); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 4px hsl(195 75% 60%); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.93); }

components.name: Glass Pill
components.description: The signature floating-glass chrome: thick translucent ring, frosted fill, heavy blur, soft floor shadow. Idles compact, morphs open on hover.
components.css: .ds-glass-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 10px 22px; border: 4px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.15); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-glass-pill:hover { transform: scale(1.04); box-shadow: 0 24px 56px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.18), 0 0 36px hsl(195 75% 60% / 0.14); } .ds-glass-pill-kicker { font-family: 'Nunito', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.69rem; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: hsl(220 10% 45%); }

components.name: Toggle
components.description: 44×24 spring toggle; track fills Console Cyan when on.
components.css: .ds-toggle { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; } .ds-toggle input { position: absolute; opacity: 0; width: 0; height: 0; } .ds-toggle-track { width: 44px; height: 24px; border-radius: 12px; background: hsl(220 10% 80%); position: relative; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-toggle-thumb { position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.14); transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1); } .ds-toggle input:checked + .ds-toggle-track { background: hsl(195 75% 60%); } .ds-toggle input:checked + .ds-toggle-track .ds-toggle-thumb { transform: translateX(20px); } .ds-toggle input:focus-visible + .ds-toggle-track { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 4px hsl(195 75% 60%); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Soft input well with near-flat border; focus shifts border toward the accent.
components.css: .ds-input { background: hsl(210 40% 98%); color: hsl(220 10% 20%); border: 1px solid hsl(220 14% 91%); border-radius: 14px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'Nunito', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04); transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: hsl(220 10% 45%); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: hsl(220 12% 86%); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: hsl(195 75% 60%); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px hsl(195 75% 60% / 0.18); }

components.name: Page Dots
components.description: Home page indicator inside a glass pill: white-alpha discs, active dot glows in the accent.
components.html: <nav class="ds-page-dots"><button class="ds-dot" aria-label="Page 1"></button><button class="ds-dot ds-dot--active" aria-label="Page 2"></button><button class="ds-dot" aria-label="Page 3"></button></nav>
components.css: .ds-page-dots { display: inline-flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; padding: 8px 16px; border: 4px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); background: rgba(30,35,45,0.45); border-radius: 999px; backdrop-filter: blur(24px); box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.15); } .ds-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; border: none; padding: 0; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), background-color 0.2s; } .ds-dot:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); transform: scale(1.12); } .ds-dot--active { background: hsl(195 75% 60%); box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.45); } .ds-dot:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px hsl(195 75% 60%); }

components.name: Wee Card
components.description: Grouped settings/form card: very generous radius, generous padding, soft hover border shift.
components.html:
Channel behavior

Choose how channel animations play across the grid.
components.css: .ds-wee-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid hsl(214 32% 91%); border-radius: 3rem; padding: 2rem 2.5rem; max-width: 380px; transition: border-color 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-wee-card:hover { border-color: hsl(199 89% 48%); } .ds-wee-card-title { font-family: 'Nunito', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 900; font-style: italic; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: hsl(222 47% 11%); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-wee-card-body { font-family: 'Nunito', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: hsl(220 10% 45%); margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Wee's interface is a friendly public square of channels — a wallpaper-backed plaza where glass chrome floats at the edges, calm and compact until touched. Nothing on screen demands attention at rest; everything comes alive on approach. Controls idle as small frosted nubs and discs, then morph their footprint open with a springy, physical reveal when hovered or focused. The personality is playful, polished, and nostalgic: a well-made toy for adults, channeling Wii-era warmth through modern materials rather than pixel-perfect replication. This system explicitly rejects generic SaaS and dashboard chrome and Windows utility clutter, and equally rejects cartoon chaos: springs overshoot softly and settle with weight.
keyCharacteristics: Chrome floats over the wallpaper; the wallpaper is the room, the UI is furniture in it
Compact → reveal: idle states are small; hover/focus expands footprint, not just opacity
One motion vocabulary: shared springs (pillOpen / pillClose), one timing clock per domain
Semantic HSL tokens everywhere; no scattered hex in components
Accent appears as soft glow, never hard rings

rules.name: The Ambient Accent Rule
rules.body: Components never hardcode the brand color. All accent paint flows through hsl(var(--primary)) / hsl(var(--ambient-secondary)), written only by resolveEffectiveAccent + the ambient helpers. Sampling wallpaper colors inside feature components is prohibited.

rules.name: The Soft Glow Rule
rules.body: Interactive emphasis is a diffuse primary-hued glow (--shadow-hover-glow, --filter-hover-glow), never a hard accent ring (0 0 0 Npx) or a one-off colored border.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Nunito is the only typeface. New surfaces express hierarchy through weight (500→900), size, case, and italic — never by importing a second font.

rules.name: The Floor Shadow Rule
rules.body: Floating chrome casts mass on the floor: WeePillFloorShadow renders a soft blur beneath the pill that stretches when the pill expands. Depth responds to state; it is not static decoration.

dos: Do reference every color as hsl(var(--token)); extend design-system.css (light :root + .dark-mode) when a new color is needed.
Do compose new chrome from WeeGlassPill + WeePillFloorShadow + WeeGooeyIconButton, and new controls from src/ui/ primitives.
Do drive all springs through createWeeTransition(intent) and amplitudes through PLAYFUL_AMPLITUDE — one clock per transition domain.
Do animate footprint (width/height morph, 0fr → 1fr grid rows) when space changes; expansion is physical, not a fade.
Do ship every interactive state: default, hover, focus, active, disabled — disabled as a soft Wii-tint resting chip, not a gray slab.
Do gate playful and continuous motion behind useMotionFeedback / useAnimationActivity; reduced motion snaps or shortens, never breaks.
Do run npm run lint (design-system contract) and npm run build after token or Tailwind changes.
donts: Don't produce generic SaaS or dashboard chrome — sterile grids, corporate grays, admin-panel blandness.
Don't produce Windows utility clutter — dense settings trees, system-tray-app energy.
Don't add new #hex or rgba() literals in src/components/**; hex belongs only in src/design/*, src/data/**, and API-required strings.
Don't use hard accent rings (0 0 0 Npx) or one-off colored borders for emphasis — soft glow only.
Don't invent parallel timing clocks, ad-hoc spring literals, or Framer height:'auto' collapses.
Don't unmount animated overlays mid-close (if (!isOpen) return null) — presence owns exit.
Don't import a second typeface or invent a parallel type scale in feature CSS.
Don't leave always-on heavy blur, particles, or RAF loops ungated — this app runs all day.
Don't attempt pixel-perfect Wii cosplay; channel the warmth through modern glass and springs.
